name: ROI Calculator
description: Industrial-grade ROI calculator based on Lean, Six Sigma, and ISO standards for manufacturing and logistics operations.

inputs.label: Annual Revenue (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total annual revenue of the facility or business unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual revenue of the facility or business unit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tesisin veya iş biriminin toplam yıllık geliri.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu annuel total de l'installation ou de l'unité commerciale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingresos anuales totales de la instalación o unidad de negocio.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الإيرادات السنوية للمنشأة أو وحدة الأعمال.

inputs.label: Operating Margin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Current operating profit margin as a percentage of revenue.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current operating profit margin as a percentage of revenue.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelirin yüzdesi olarak mevcut faaliyet kar marjı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelle Betriebsgewinnmarge als Prozentsatz des Umsatzes.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Marge bénéficiaire opérationnelle actuelle en pourcentage du chiffre d'affaires.
businessContext_i18n.es: Margen de beneficio operativo actual como porcentaje de los ingresos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: هامش الربح التشغيلي الحالي كنسبة مئوية من الإيرادات.

inputs.label: Total Inventory Value (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Current value of all inventory held (raw materials, WIP, finished goods).

businessContext_i18n.en: Current value of all inventory held (raw materials, WIP, finished goods).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut tüm stokların değeri (hammadde, yarı mamul, mamul).
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktueller Wert aller Lagerbestände (Rohstoffe, Umlaufbestand, Fertigwaren).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur actuelle de tous les stocks détenus (matières premières, encours, produits finis).
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor actual de todo el inventario mantenido (materias primas, WIP, productos terminados).
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة الحالية لجميع المخزون المحتفظ به (مواد خام، أعمال تحت التنفيذ، سلع تامة الصنع).

inputs.label: Inventory Carrying Cost (% of inventory value)
inputs.businessContext: Annual cost to hold inventory (storage, insurance, obsolescence, capital cost). Typical range 20-30%.

label_i18n.en: Inventory Carrying Cost (% of inventory value)
label_i18n.fr: Coût de possession des stocks (% de la valeur des stocks)
label_i18n.es: Costo de mantenimiento de inventario (% del valor del inventario)
label_i18n.ar: تكلفة حمل المخزون (% من قيمة المخزون)

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual cost to hold inventory (storage, insurance, obsolescence, capital cost). Typical range 20-30%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Stok bulundurmanın yıllık maliyeti (depolama, sigorta, eskime, sermaye maliyeti). Tipik aralık %20-30.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Kosten für die Lagerhaltung (Lagerung, Versicherung, Veralterung, Kapitalkosten). Typischer Bereich 20-30%.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût annuel de détention des stocks (stockage, assurance, obsolescence, coût du capital). Plage typique 20-30%.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo anual de mantener inventario (almacenamiento, seguros, obsolescencia, costo de capital). Rango típico 20-30%.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكلفة السنوية لحمل المخزون (التخزين، التأمين، التقادم، تكلفة رأس المال). النطاق النموذجي 20-30%.

inputs.label: Annual Direct Labor Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total annual cost of direct labor in the operation.

label_i18n.es: Costo anual de mano de obra directa (USD)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual cost of direct labor in the operation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Operasyondaki direkt işçiliğin toplam yıllık maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte jährliche direkte Arbeitskosten im Betrieb.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût annuel total de la main-d'œuvre directe dans l'exploitation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo anual total de mano de obra directa en la operación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي التكلفة السنوية للعمالة المباشرة في العملية.

inputs.label: Defect Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of products that do not meet quality standards (Six Sigma metric).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of products that do not meet quality standards (Six Sigma metric).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalite standartlarını karşılamayan ürünlerin yüzdesi (Altı Sigma metriği).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Produkte, die die Qualitätsstandards nicht erfüllen (Six Sigma-Kennzahl).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de produits ne répondant pas aux normes de qualité (métrique Six Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de productos que no cumplen con los estándares de calidad (métrica Seis Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة المنتجات التي لا تفي بمعايير الجودة (مقياس ستة سيجما).

inputs.label: Cost per Defect (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Average cost incurred per defective unit (rework, scrap, warranty).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost incurred per defective unit (rework, scrap, warranty).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kusurlu birim başına ortalama maliyet (yeniden işleme, fire, garanti).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Kosten pro fehlerhafter Einheit (Nacharbeit, Ausschuss, Garantie).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen encouru par unité défectueuse (reprise, rebut, garantie).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo promedio incurrido por unidad defectuosa (reproceso, desperdicio, garantía).
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط التكلفة المتكبدة لكل وحدة معيبة (إعادة العمل، الهدر، الضمان).

inputs.label: Annual Energy Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total annual energy expenditure for the facility.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual energy expenditure for the facility.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tesis için toplam yıllık enerji harcaması.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte jährliche Energieausgaben für die Anlage.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépense énergétique annuelle totale pour l'installation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gasto energético anual total de la instalación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الإنفاق السنوي على الطاقة للمنشأة.

rules.message: Defect rate must be between 0% and 100%.
Improvement factor must be between 0 and 1.
Annual revenue must be at least $100,000.
ISO 9001 certified facilities typically have defect rates below 3%. Please verify.

thresholds.message: Defect rate exceeds 10% - immediate quality improvement recommended.
Operating margin below 5% - cost reduction initiatives critical.
Inventory value exceeds 30% of annual revenue - potential excess inventory.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
